case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. GENE KIM

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100094353)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-03-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
